conversation.text: we already have a team that handles enquiries
How fast are they getting back to people typically?
And that holds up evenings and weekends?
well no, weekends nobody really checks
Yeah that's usually where the gap is. Someone looking for a solicitor at 9pm on a Saturday is probably filling in 3 forms. The firm that responds first usually wins

Yeah we see it a lot with legal. The agent handles the first touch, qualifies them, and hands them to your team with context so they're only dealing with serious enquiries. Doesn't replace anyone, just catches the ones that slip through
Before I send you the link, any concerns?

It's built specifically around your business so it only operates within what it's trained on. Louis can walk you through exactly how the legal side works on the call
https://calendly.com/markeye/free-discovery-call
